messages: {"parts":[{"content":"The tradeoffs DO have `reason` data. My earlier test was wrong (I checked for `evidence` key which doesn't exist). But one `reason` is broken: `\"Demonstrated \\\"...\\\" across multiple systems\"` — the regex is stripping too aggressively.\n\nNow let me check behavioral evidence:","id":null,"provider_name":null,"provider_details":null,"part_kind":"text"},{"tool_name":"run_bash_command","args":"{\"cmd\": \"python3 -c \\\"\\nimport json\\nwith open('/tmp/archit-test-data.json') as f:\\n    data = json.load(f)\\n\\nprint('=== BEHAVIORAL EVIDENCE (full) ===')\\nbe = data.get('behavioral_evidence', [])\\nprint(f'Count: {len(be)}')\\nfor b in be:\\n    print(json.dumps(b, indent=2))\\n\\\"\"}","tool_call_id":"toolu_016Mpg7ZnpsJ5HDK6fAyjsMn","id":null,"provider_name":null,"provider_details":null,"part_kind":"tool-call"}],"usage":{"input_tokens":68624,"cache_write_tokens":632,"cache_read_tokens":67991,"output_tokens":223,"input_audio_tokens":0,"cache_audio_read_tokens":0,"output_audio_tokens":0,"details":{"cache_creation_input_tokens":632,"cache_read_input_tokens":67991,"input_tokens":1,"output_tokens":223}},"model_name":"claude-opus-4-5-20251101","timestamp":"2026-02-07T17:34:30.711492Z","kind":"response","provider_name":"anthropic","provider_url":"https://api.anthropic.com","provider_details":{"finish_reason":"tool_use","zo_persona_id":"3700edcc-9785-4dee-9530-ad4a440293d9","zo_persona_name":"Vibe Operator"},"provider_response_id":"msg_01Mjcz2YX5X3wvoqtR9RP3LD","finish_reason":"tool_call","run_id":"5974177d-1cac-4a24-bdd6-338c31a6a19c","metadata":null}
